sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:06 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem848_verify_after_claude_patch_tick.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if ps=='triad_pass_real_response_ready':
    status='next_process_real_response'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and prepare agreed protocol'
elif ps=='dispatch_results_missing_after_claude_patch_tick':
    status='next_repair_dispatch_results'
    next_action='inspect queue processor result writer and commit path'
elif ps=='runtime_missing_after_dispatch':
    status='next_repair_runtime_state'
    next_action='parse dispatch results and patch dispatcher runtime state writer'
elif ps=='real_response_still_missing_after_prompt_patch':
    status='next_diagnose_response_writer'
    next_action='inspect verifier state and Claude action outcome; patch workflow so missing response fails visibly'
else:
    status='next_diagnose_unknown'
    next_action='diagnose unknown BEM-848 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_route_after_bem848.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_route_after_bem848.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Route After BEM-848 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem849_route_after_bem848.json','governance/reports/bem849_route_after_bem848.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
